title: Mission
body:
Mission
Create the definitive career guide for Enterprise Digital Experience Engineers.

  • Evidence over assumptions
  • Long-term value
  • Publication quality
  • Continuous improvement

title: Career Strategy
body:
• Target Product Companies and GCCs.
  • Build modern AEM, Java and Cloud expertise.
  • Optimize personal branding before applications.

title: Professional Branding
body: Position yourself as an Enterprise Digital Experience Engineer rather than only an AEM Developer.

title: Core Skills
body: AEM • AEM Sites • AEMaaCS • Java • Dispatcher • Sling • OSGi • HTL • Core Components • Spring Boot • React

title: Learning Roadmap
body:
1. Edge Delivery Services
  2. Universal Editor
  3. GraphQL
  4. Advanced Content Fragments
  5. Adobe Experience Platform

title: Career Command Center
body:
• Master Company Database
  • Recruiter CRM
  • Application Tracker
  • Interview Tracker
  • Learning Tracker
  • Decision Log

title: Living Roadmap
body: This handbook will expand into interviews, salary, visa opportunities, Adobe Partners, templates and references.
